Order Your Custom Display Today PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Material Choice: 13 oz Vinyl for Banner Retractors 14 oz No Curl Vinyl for Banner Retractors Banner Soft Fabric for Banner Retractors Product: with Superb Telescoping Retractor Hardware Quantity: (Min: 1, Max: 1000) Size (H x W): 78" x 33" PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Telescoping Retractor Banner Overview for Professional Display

The Superb Telescoping Retractor delivers professional presentation capabilities with sleek design and exceptional functionality. This premium banner system features specially engineered poles and rollers that telescope from within the base, providing adjustable display heights from 78" down to 33". The innovative telescoping mechanism allows for quick graphic changes and customized height positioning for any venue.

Perfect for trade shows, retail displays, conferences, and promotional events, this retractor banner system combines portability with professional presentation quality. The durable construction ensures reliable performance while the user-friendly design makes setup and breakdown effortless.

Each system includes the complete telescoping hardware mechanism and one full-color custom banner printed on your choice of premium materials. The compact base design provides stability while maintaining the elegant profile that makes this system ideal for professional environments.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Retractor Banner Material for Indoor & Outdoor Use

Your telescoping retractor banner system includes professional hardware and a custom 78" x 33" banner printed on your selected material.

Premium Material Options

13 oz Vinyl: Our standard banner material engineered for both indoor and outdoor applications. Delivers excellent print quality with reliable durability for extended display use.

14 oz No Curl Vinyl: Premium quality material featuring high-resolution print capabilities with smooth matte finish. Enhanced weight prevents curling and maintains flat presentation.

Banner Soft Fabric: Professional fabric material with matte finish delivering vibrant color reproduction. Ideal for indoor applications requiring premium presentation quality.

Size Variance Notice: Vinyl materials are temperature-sensitive and may experience slight size fluctuations during printing and finishing processes. Standard acceptable variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot. For applications requiring precise dimensions, please consult with our customer service team.

Request free material samples to evaluate print quality and material characteristics for your specific application.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Retractor Banner Finishing & Hardware Options

Each telescoping retractor system includes professional finishing and complete hardware assembly for immediate use.

Hardware Specifications

The Superb Telescoping mechanism features precision-engineered components including adjustable pole system, stabilizing base, and smooth-action roller mechanism. The telescoping design allows height adjustment from 78" maximum down to 33" minimum display height.

Banner Finishing

All banners receive professional finishing including reinforced top and bottom edges for secure hardware attachment. The banner mounting system allows for quick graphic changes without tools.

System Configuration

Available configurations include complete system with hardware and banner, hardware-only option for replacement needs, or replacement banners for existing hardware systems.

Assembly & Portability

The compact design ensures easy transport and storage. Complete system assembles quickly without tools and includes carrying case for professional portability.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Telescoping Retractor Production & Turnaround Times

We provide flexible production scheduling from one to five business days, allowing you to control timing for your custom telescoping retractor banner system.

1 Business Day Priority Production

Ultra-fast turnaround for urgent deadlines and last-minute events.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day
  • Emergency same-day production available in select cases - contact customer service
  • Production time plus shipping time determines total delivery schedule
  • Turnaround begins when file upload completes or proof approval is received

2 Business Day Express Production

Expedited production for tight schedules requiring premium turnaround.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day
  • Ideal for trade show preparation and event planning
  • Production time plus shipping time determines total delivery schedule
  • Turnaround begins when file upload completes or proof approval is received

3 Business Day Standard Production

Most popular production option offering fast turnaround at no additional cost.

  • Free standard production time for most custom orders
  • Sufficient time for quality control and careful finishing
  • Production time plus shipping time determines total delivery schedule
  • Turnaround begins when file upload completes or proof approval is received

5 Business Day Saver Production

Cost-effective option for advance planning and budget-conscious projects.

  • Reduced pricing for extended production schedule
  • Ideal for advance event preparation
  • Production time plus shipping time determines total delivery schedule
  • Turnaround begins when file upload completes or proof approval is received
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Telescoping Retractor Banner Payment & Ordering Options

All telescoping retractor banner systems require payment prior to production start to ensure immediate processing once artwork is approved.

Accepted Payment Methods

We accept all major credit cards including Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover for immediate order processing.

Check payments are accepted and must be received before production begins. Review our check payment process for detailed information.

Payment Processing

Credit card charges are processed only after order approval and artwork confirmation. This ensures complete accuracy before payment processing.

Order Approval Process

All orders require artwork approval before production. Order proofs are available upon request to verify design, specifications, and order details before final approval.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Telescoping Retractor Banner Delivery

Professional packaging ensures safe delivery of your telescoping retractor banner system hardware and graphics.

General Shipping Guidelines for Banner Hardware

Contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 for specific shipping questions before placing your order.

Standard shipping applies unless upgraded options are selected during checkout. Tracking information is provided once shipment is processed.

Shipping costs are calculated based on package weight, dimensions, and destination. Additional charges apply for oversized hardware systems.

After shipment, all carrier terms and conditions apply for delivery timing and package handling. Lost or damaged packages are handled according to carrier policies with replacement processing after carrier confirmation.

Available Shipping Methods for Retractor Banners

Economy Shipping (5–10 Business Days): Cost-effective option for advance planning. Include complete address information including P.O. Box details for reliable delivery.

Standard Shipping (3–5 Business Days): Most popular shipping option balancing speed and cost for most delivery requirements.

Three Day Shipping (3 Business Days): Expedited delivery for event preparation and trade show schedules.

Two Day Shipping (2 Business Days): Premium delivery for urgent requirements and last-minute event needs.

Overnight Shipping (1 Business Day): Fastest delivery option for critical deadlines and emergency requirements.

International Shipping

International shipments require customer-provided shipping labels and customs documentation. We accept USPS and UPS international shipping labels. Contact customer service for international shipping coordination.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Display Applications for Telescoping Retractor Banners

Telescoping retractor banner systems provide versatile display solutions for numerous professional applications requiring adjustable height presentation.

Trade Show & Exhibition Display

Perfect for booth displays, product presentations, and promotional messaging at trade shows and conferences. The adjustable height feature accommodates various booth configurations and ceiling restrictions.

Retail & Point of Sale Display

Excellent for storefront promotions, seasonal campaigns, and product launches. The professional appearance and easy graphic changes make it ideal for dynamic retail environments.

Corporate Events & Presentations

Suitable for corporate meetings, seminars, and presentations where professional appearance and quick setup are essential. The compact transport design makes it perfect for multi-location events.

Educational & Institutional Use

Ideal for schools, libraries, and institutions requiring portable display solutions for announcements, educational content, and event promotion.

Healthcare & Professional Services

Appropriate for medical offices, professional services, and healthcare facilities requiring informational displays and promotional messaging in professional environments.

Event & Wedding Display

Popular for wedding ceremonies, special events, and celebrations requiring elegant presentation with easy setup and breakdown capabilities.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Telescoping Retractor Banner Artwork Requirements for Printing

Professional graphic files ensure optimal print quality for your telescoping retractor banner display.

Recommended File Formats

Vector-based files such as .eps with fonts converted to outlines produce the highest quality results. High-resolution .pdf and .jpg files are also acceptable for most applications.

Our professional graphic design team can evaluate your files and provide recommendations for optimal print quality if you're unsure about file specifications.

Order Proof Options

Order proofs allow verification of design accuracy, order specifications, and billing information before production begins. Proofs include low-resolution artwork preview and complete order summary for your approval.

Orders with requested proofs will not enter production until written approval is received, ensuring complete accuracy for your final product.

Color Matching Services

For color-critical projects, our Color Match Proof System provides the most accurate color verification for your specific requirements. Contact customer service representatives for detailed information about color matching services.

File Upload Requirements

Upload files up to 60 MB directly through our system. For larger files, contact customer service for special upload instructions to ensure fastest processing.

Files should be sized to final print dimensions with appropriate resolution (typically 300 dpi or higher) for optimal print quality.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Telescoping Retractor Banners for Your Next Event

Transform your professional presentations with premium telescoping retractor banner systems that deliver exceptional versatility and professional appearance. Whether you're preparing for trade shows, retail displays, or corporate events, our custom retractor banners provide the perfect combination of portability and impact.

Professional Quality & Durability

Each telescoping retractor system features precision-engineered hardware built for reliable performance and professional presentation. Our premium vinyl and fabric materials ensure vibrant graphics that maintain their quality through multiple uses and various display environments.

Complete Customization Options

Choose from multiple material options including 13 oz vinyl, 14 oz no-curl vinyl, and banner soft fabric to match your specific display requirements. Our professional design team can create custom graphics or work with your existing artwork to produce stunning results.

Fast Production & Reliable Delivery

With production options from 1 to 5 business days and comprehensive shipping choices, we ensure your telescoping retractor banner system arrives when you need it. Our experienced customer service team coordinates every detail for seamless order fulfillment.

Ready to create your professional display solution? Our telescoping retractor banner systems combine innovative design with exceptional quality for presentations that make lasting impressions.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Telescoping Retractor Banner FAQ

What height adjustments are available with the telescoping retractor?

The Superb Telescoping Retractor adjusts from a maximum height of 78" down to a minimum of 33", allowing you to customize the display height for different venues and applications.

How easy is it to change graphics on the telescoping retractor?

The system is designed for quick and easy graphic changes without requiring tools. The banner mounting mechanism allows you to swap graphics efficiently for different events or campaigns.

What material works best for telescoping retractor banners?

Material choice depends on your application: 13 oz vinyl for standard indoor/outdoor use, 14 oz no-curl vinyl for premium presentation, or banner soft fabric for indoor applications requiring vibrant colors and matte finish.

Can I order just replacement banners for existing hardware?

Yes, we offer replacement banners for existing telescoping retractor hardware, as well as hardware-only options and complete systems with both hardware and banner.

What file formats do you accept for telescoping retractor banner artwork?

We recommend vector files like .eps with outlined fonts for best results. High-resolution .pdf and .jpg files are also acceptable. Our design team can evaluate your files and provide recommendations.

How portable is the telescoping retractor system?

The system features a compact design that telescopes into the base for easy transport and storage. The lightweight construction makes it ideal for trade shows and events requiring frequent setup.

Do you offer color matching for telescoping retractor banners?

Yes, our Color Match Proof System provides accurate color verification for color-critical projects. Contact our customer service team for details about color matching services.

What's included with a complete telescoping retractor system?

Complete systems include the telescoping hardware mechanism, stabilizing base, and one custom full-color banner printed on your choice of material, ready for immediate use.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
